sso/ENTRA_CLIENT_ID.description: Microsoft Entra app (client) ID for BindGUI auth

sso/ENTRA_TENANT_ID.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID for BindGUI auth

ssh/PRIVATE_KEY.description: PEM private key for the RIS login node (fetch_secrets.py writes it to BINDGUI_SSH_KEY, chmod 600). Multi-line: escape newlines as \n, or store base64 and decode in the loader.
ssh/PRIVATE_KEY.value: -----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----\n...\n-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----

ssh/KEY_PASSPHRASE.description: Passphrase for ssh/PRIVATE_KEY. OMIT this entry entirely if the key is unencrypted (Secrets Manager rejects an empty SecretString).
